title: Prefrontal Cortex 5-HT1A Receptor-Coupled Inwardly Rectifying Potassium Channels Decreased Seizure Susceptibility in Rat Models With Autism Spectrum Disorder.
abstract: Dysregulation of serotonin 1A receptor (5-HT1A) is implicated in ASD and epilepsy. The study used 8-OH-DPAT to activate PFC 5-HT1A in a VPA-induced rat model of ASD. ASD rats showed E/I imbalance and increased seizure susceptibility. 5-HT1AR activation alleviated epileptic activity through Kir3 channel-mediated hyperpolarization.
